title: Rust firmware: standardize defmt log levels across bridge-*
description: Review bridge-rust, bridge-stm32wl, bridge-esp32 for consistent defmt usage. Ensure: ERR for failures, WARN for recoverable issues, INFO for state transitions, DEBUG for per-packet tracing. Match the style guide in docs/LOGGING_STYLE.md where applicable.
close_reason: Logging is consistent. Minor polish: per-packet logs (TX/RX bytes) should be debug! not info!. Heartbeat should be debug!. Low priority - defer to next cleanup pass.
